languages.text: "Результаты сканирования жизнеформы говорят об обратном. Пульс движется к нормированным значениям".
"The scan results state the opposite. The heart rate of this life form is returning to normal."
languages.original_text: "Результаты сканирования жизнеформы говорят об обратном. Пульс движется к нормированным значениям".

traits.locale_text: "The scan results state the opposite. The heart rate of this life form is returning to normal."
"The scan results state the opposite. The heart rate of this life form is returning to normal."
"Request denied as contradicting the objective indicators of heart rate and temperature of the injured unit."
"The scan results state the opposite. The heart rate of this life form is returning to normal."
"The scan results state the opposite. The heart rate of this life form is returning to normal."

languages.text: 「リクエストは、負傷ユニットの心拍数および体温という客観的指標に反しているため、却下されました」
languages.original_text: "Request denied as contradicting the objective indicators of heart rate and temperature of the injured unit."

traits.locale_text: リクエストは、負傷ユニットの心拍数および体温という客観的指標に反しているため、却下されました。

languages.text: « Les résultats de l'analyse indiquent le contraire. Le rythme cardiaque de cette entité redevient normal. »
languages.original_text: "The scan results state the opposite. The heart rate of this life form is returning to normal."

traits.locale_text: « Les résultats de l'analyse indiquent le contraire. Le rythme cardiaque de cette entité redevient normal. »

languages.text: "Tarama sonuçları aksini söylüyor. Bu yaşam formunun kalp atış hızı normale dönüyor."
languages.original_text: "The scan results state the opposite. The heart rate of this life form is returning to normal."

traits.locale_text: "Tarama sonuçları aksini söylüyor. Bu yaşam formunun kalp atış hızı normale dönüyor."

languages.text: "Die Ergebnisse des Scans besagen das Gegenteil. Die Herzfrequenz dieser Lebensform normalisiert sich."
languages.original_text: "The scan results state the opposite. The heart rate of this life form is returning to normal."

traits.locale_text: "Die Ergebnisse des Scans besagen das Gegenteil. Die Herzfrequenz dieser Lebensform normalisiert sich."

languages.text: «Los resultados del análisis muestran lo contrario. El ritmo cardíaco de esta forma de vida vuelve a la normalidad».
languages.original_text: "The scan results state the opposite. The heart rate of this life form is returning to normal."

traits.locale_text: «Los resultados del análisis muestran lo contrario. El ritmo cardíaco de esta forma de vida vuelve a la normalidad».

languages.text: “扫描结果恰恰相反。该生命体的心率正在恢复正常。”
languages.original_text: "The scan results state the opposite. The heart rate of this life form is returning to normal."

traits.locale_text: “扫描结果恰恰相反。该生命体的心率正在恢复正常。”
